summary: Iteration 29: Complete validation of BrandMindmap (rewritten with clickable nodes and detail panel) and BrandJourney (new page with 5 phases). All features working correctly - 100% frontend pass rate.
passed_tests: Frontend: Mindmap page (/mindmap) loads with brand data
Frontend: Mindmap shows 7 pillar nodes in circle layout around central brand node (START, VALORES, PROPOSITO, PROMESSA, POSICIONAMENTO, PERSONALIDADE, UNIVERSAL)
Frontend: Central brand node shows brand name and completion percentage
Frontend: Pillar nodes are clickable - clicking legend button opens detail panel on right
Frontend: Detail panel shows pillar name, description, progress bar, content items
Frontend: Detail panel 'Ir para Proposito' button navigates to /pillars/purpose
Frontend: Detail panel close button (X) works correctly
Frontend: Mindmap 'Tela Cheia' (fullscreen) button works - activates fullscreen mode
Frontend: Fullscreen mode shows brand info, PNG export button, and Sair (exit) button
Frontend: Escape key exits fullscreen mode
Frontend: Mindmap 'Exportar' button is enabled and clickable
Frontend: Legend shows all 7 pillars with color indicators
Frontend: Journey page (/journey) loads with brand data
Frontend: Journey shows overall progress bar with percentage (14%)
Frontend: Journey shows 'Proximo Passo Recomendado' card with 'Ir agora' button
Frontend: Journey shows 5 phases: Fundacao (33%), Diferenciacao (0%), Expressao (0%), Gestao (25%), Crescimento (0%)
Frontend: Phase 1 (Fundacao) contains Start, Valores, Proposito modules
Frontend: Phase 2 (Diferenciacao) contains Promessa, Posicionamento modules
Frontend: Phase 3 (Expressao) contains Personalidade, Universal, Naming, Jeito de Ser modules
Frontend: Phase 4 (Gestao) contains Planejamento, Campanhas, Social, Integracoes modules
Frontend: Phase 5 (Crescimento) contains Relatorios, Benchmark, Saude, Valuation modules
Frontend: Module cards are clickable and navigate to correct routes
Frontend: Start module card navigates to /pillars/start
Frontend: Campaigns module card navigates to /campaigns
Frontend: Module cards show completion percentage and status icons
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Jornada' link that navigates to /journey
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Mapa Mental' link that navigates to /mindmap
Frontend: Navigation between mindmap, journey, dashboard and pillar pages works correctly
Frontend: 'Ir agora' button on recommended next step navigates to correct route
critical_code_review_comments: BrandMindmap.js: Well-implemented using @xyflow/react with onNodeClick handler for pillar selection
BrandMindmap.js: Circle layout algorithm correctly positions 7 pillars around central brand node
BrandMindmap.js: DetailPanel component properly shows pillar info with progress bar and navigation button
BrandMindmap.js: Fullscreen mode implemented with proper Escape key handling
BrandMindmap.js: Export functionality uses html2canvas for PNG generation

BrandMindmap.js: All data-testid attributes present for testing (brand-mindmap-page, mindmap-canvas, export-mindmap-btn, fullscreen-mindmap-btn, legend-*, mindmap-detail-panel, navigate-to-pillar-btn, close-detail-panel)
BrandJourney.js: Clean implementation with 5 phases (foundation, differentiation, expression, management, growth)
BrandJourney.js: Progress tracking correctly fetches from /api/brands/{brand_id}/metrics and /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns
BrandJourney.js: Module cards correctly compute status (done/in_progress/pending) based on pillar completion
BrandJourney.js: Recommended next action logic correctly identifies first incomplete module
BrandJourney.js: All data-testid attributes present (brand-journey-page, journey-overall-progress, journey-next-action, journey-next-action-btn, phase-*, journey-module-*)
Layout.js: Sidebar correctly includes 'Jornada' link with Route icon at position 2 in topItems array
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 validated the rewritten BrandMindmap and new BrandJourney pages. Key findings: 1) Mindmap uses @xyflow/react with 7 pillar nodes in circle layout, clickable nodes open detail panel with pillar info and navigation button, fullscreen mode works with Escape key exit, export button enabled. 2) Journey page shows 5 phases (Fundacao, Diferenciacao, Expressao, Gestao, Crescimento) with progress tracking, module cards are clickable and navigate to correct routes, recommended next step card with 'Ir agora' button works. 3) Sidebar correctly shows 'Jornada' and 'Mapa Mental' links. NO MOCKED APIs - all endpoints are real. Tutorial modal appears on first login - need to click through 'Próximo' buttons to dismiss.
notes: Both BrandMindmap and BrandJourney features are fully functional. The mindmap provides an interactive visualization of brand pillars with detail panel for each pillar. The journey page provides a structured 5-phase roadmap with progress tracking and recommended next steps. All navigation flows work correctly between pages.
